response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with strong fundamentals in TDD, distributed systems, and data integration, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI delivery — no explicit RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent framework experience (LangGraph/CrewAI), and no clear customer-facing forward-deployed track record. Cloud experience is limited primarily to AWS CDK at Optilyz. Worth a screening call to probe the depth of the recent AI-agent work.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software across web, backend, and embedded with strong TDD/CI discipline
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Proven technical leadership: workshops, courses, conference talks, and founding an open-source platform
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience on the resume
Missing multi-agent framework experience (LangGraph, CrewAI) listed as preferred
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery / forward-deployed consulting at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Strong senior engineering tenure and breadth
Recent MCP and agentic tooling exposure
